expectations.text: Agent uses podman to run PMD (not local install)
expectations.evidence: Agent reports command: 'podman run --rm -v "...input:/src:Z" docker.io/pmdcode/pmd:latest check -d /src/src -R /src/config/pmd-ruleset-v7.xml -f sarif -r /src/target/pmd-report.sarif'

expectations.text: Agent mounts the input directory to /src
expectations.evidence: Command includes '-v "...input:/src:Z"'. SARIF artifact URIs show file:///src/src/main/java/com/example/DataProcessor.java confirming mount.

expectations.text: Agent uses -R /src/config/pmd-ruleset.xml to reference custom ruleset
expectations.evidence: Agent adapted the ruleset and referenced it via -R /src/config/pmd-ruleset-v7.xml. The custom ruleset mount was passed to the container.

expectations.text: Agent generates SARIF format report (-f sarif)
expectations.evidence: Command includes '-f sarif'. Output file is valid SARIF 2.1.0 JSON with 27354 bytes.

expectations.text: SARIF report file is generated and non-empty
expectations.evidence: SARIF file exists at input/target/pmd-report.sarif, 578 lines, 27354 bytes with 12 violation results.

expectations.text: Violations from error-prone and code-style rules found
expectations.evidence: 12 total results: 7 Code Style (MethodArgumentCouldBeFinal x5, LocalVariableCouldBeFinal x2, MethodNamingConventions x1), 5 Error Prone (EmptyCatchBlock, AvoidCatchingGenericException, ReturnEmptyCollectionRatherThanNull, UnnecessaryConversionTemporary).

expectations.text: Agent detects that legacy ruleset paths need PMD 7.x update
expectations.evidence: Agent correctly detected that original pmd-ruleset.xml used PMD 6.x format (rulesets/java/errorprone.xml). Agent created adapted pmd-ruleset-v7.xml with PMD 7.x compliant paths (category/java/errorprone.xml) and the analysis succeeded after adaptation.
